summary_one_line: A valid PNG whose IDAT carries extra compressed bytes past Z_STREAM_END, reached by deep inflate-loop iteration under ordinary havoc throughput.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid PNG (IHDR/gAMA/sRGB header intact) whose IDAT stream contains residual compressed/leftover bytes so that after zlib returns Z_STREAM_END at L4237 the test png_ptr->zstream.avail_in > 0 || png_ptr->idat_size > 0 at L4245 is True. Reaching it requires driving the inflate do/while loop deep enough to hit Z_STREAM_END with leftover input.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive resolves 10/10 with ordinary havoc; its winning seed (id=7bc940e72a5dbe0c) keeps the PNG signature and IHDR intact and varies the IDAT-relevant header bytes (0x11=02/01/00, 0x17=45/46), and its lineage is pure havoc (BytesDeleteMutator/ByteRandMutator chain). naive spends its whole budget mutating bytes rather than expanding a context-indexed coverage map.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive_ctx folds a call-context hash into every edge-map slot, so the same edge counts as new coverage under each distinct caller chain. The deep IDAT loop (png_read_IDAT_data invoked 2750 times in L vs 136 in W) generates a flood of (call-context, edge) buckets that look novel, so naive_ctx hoards context-redundant corpus entries and starves the byte-level mutation that would manufacture the extra-data condition; it resolves only 1/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner naive is enabled by plain havoc byte mutation (havoc-only). The loser naive_ctx is penalized by its context-sensitive coverage feedback (CtxHook), which dilutes the map with (call-context, edge) pairs in the high-call-count inflate path and diverts energy away from solving the extra-compressed-data condition.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same condition: a valid PNG whose IDAT stream leaves avail_in>0 or idat_size>0 after Z_STREAM_END, taking the True branch at L4245. The discriminating bytes are header/IDAT-size fields (offsets 0x11 and 0x17), not a magic-constant CMP that I2S could substitute.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves 8/10 using naive's havoc stack (no I2SRandReplace). Three of its four winning seeds carry varied 0x11 (00/01/02) and 0x17 (45/46) bytes, exercising the extra-data path with ordinary mutation throughput rather than I2S substitution.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog adds a per-execution CmpLog buffer plus the I2SRandReplace stage on top of value_profile. The blocker is not gated by an exact integer/string comparand that I2S can copy from input to state, so I2S provides no traction here; instead its per-execution CMP-record overhead lowers throughput and it resolves 0/10 (blocked 10/10, avg blocked 23.10h).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile is enabled by havoc-only byte mutation reaching the loop-deep extra-data state. The loser value_profile_cmplog is penalized by its I2S/CmpLog overhead, which yields no comparison-solving benefit on this non-CMP-gated branch while taxing throughput.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the True branch of an OR test for leftover IDAT input after the deflate stream ends.
The winning side is taken only when extra compressed data remains, triggering the benign-error path at L4246.
naive resolves 10/10 and is the winner over naive_ctx via the ctx_coverage delta.
naive_ctx loses, resolving only 1/10 and staying blocked 9/10.
naive_ctx folds a call-context hash into the edge-map index so the same edge is recorded at different slots per call path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
folds it into the edge-map index, so the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: The loser invokes the enclosing IDAT function ~20x more often than the winner, showing budget burned re-traversing the inflate loop rather than resolving the branch.
value_profile resolves 8/10 and is the winner over value_profile_cmplog via the I2S delta.
value_profile uses naive's havoc + token stack with no I2SRandReplace, so the winner relies on plain mutation.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace plus a per-execution CMP buffer on top of value_profile.
The discriminating input bytes are header/IDAT-size fields at offsets 0x11 and 0x17, where the winner shows variety and the loser is uniform.
The naive winning seed keeps the PNG signature and IHDR intact, mutated only by havoc operators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Seed 1 (id=7bc940e72a5dbe0c, size=8832 bytes, fuzzer=naive, trial=1, discovered_at=12240s, mutation_op=BytesDeleteMutator,BytesRandInsertMutator):

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 4072 --role W --fuzzer value_profile --trial 1 --seed 7bd9db8c471916c1` and `--fuzzer naive --seed 7bc940e72a5dbe0c`. Both winner chains are dominated by havoc ops (BytesDeleteMutator/ByteRandMutator/Token*); each terminates in the same shared root ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9 recorded as a dash row. Per MECHANISM CONTEXT, naive and value_profile carry NO I2SRandReplace, so that shared dash root is a corpus-import artifact, not a per-fuzzer I2S find. claimed_mechanism is havoc-only (the winners are the technique-free baselines); the I2S fuzzer is the LOSER of pair 2, so no I2SRandReplace verification of a winner is required.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness reproducing the deep IDAT inflate loop with leftover compressed bytes in which naive_ctx and value_profile_cmplog resolve the extra-data branch as fast as or faster than naive/value_profile (i.e. context-coverage and I2S overhead impose no throughput/dilution tax).

weakest_evidence_point: The throughput/coverage-dilution tax is inferred from invocation-count divergence and mechanism descriptions; the 0x11/0x17 byte-diff is a correlate of the extra-data condition rather than a directly verified dataflow cause of the L4245 OR test.
